description: When Steak Met Potatoes with Creamy Peppercorn Sauce & Garlic Kale
directions:
1. Wash and cut potatoes into 1-inch cubes\n\
2. Boil potatoes in salted water for 15-20 minutes until tender\n\
3. Drain and mash potatoes with butter, milk, salt, and pepper\n\
4. Mince garlic and remove kale stems, then chop leaves\n\
5. Heat olive oil in a pan and sauté garlic for 30 seconds\n\
6. Add kale and cook until wilted, season with salt and pepper\n\
7. Pat steaks dry and season both sides with salt and pepper\n\
8. Heat pan over medium-high heat and cook steaks 3-5 minutes per side\n\
9. Remove steaks and let rest\n\
10. In same pan, add peppercorns, sour cream, and a splash of water to create sauce\n\
11. Simmer until slightly thickened\n\
12. Plate mashed potatoes, kale, and steak\n\
13. Drizzle peppercorn sauce over steak and serve"
